Object# MisalignedBillingCycleError

Advanced Commerce API 1.0+

```
object MisalignedBillingCycleError
```

## [Properties](/documentation/AdvancedCommerceAPI/MisalignedBillingCycleError#properties)

`errorCode``number`

 Value: `4000147``errorMessage``string`

 Value: `The request contains a billing period that doesn't align with the subscription's billing cycle.`## [See Also](/documentation/AdvancedCommerceAPI/MisalignedBillingCycleError#see-also)
